questiontext.text: which of the following is the NET of a cube?
Which of the following figures is NOT exactly embedded in the given figure as one of its parts?
Select the CORRECT mirror image of the given word.
How many line(s) of symmetry is/are there in the given figure?
Which of the following figures has same fraction of unshaded part as the fraction of shaded part of the Fig. (X)?
Which of the following is an open figure?
Kirti wrote her name on the board as shown below. How many of the following letters have parallel lines?

answer.text: The perimeter of shaded part of figure P is 90 cm.
The perimeter of shaded part of figure Q is 112 cm.
The number of lines of symmetry in figure Q is 1.
